tasks.task_description: Extend createToolApprovalHooks to add onEnd hook that tracks usage stats in conversation metadata
Add API endpoint GET /agents/:slug/conversations/:id/stats to retrieve conversation statistics
Create TypeScript interface for conversation stats structure
Add UI component in chat dock to display stats with toggle button
Test stats tracking with a sample conversation

description: Add conversation statistics tracking (tokens, cost, turns, tool calls) to work-agent
context: Added onEnd hook to createToolApprovalHooks that tracks cumulative conversation stats (input/output tokens, turns, tool calls, estimated cost) in conversation metadata. Also added calculateCost helper method with Bedrock pricing.

Added GET /agents/:slug/conversations/:conversationId/stats endpoint that returns conversation statistics including context window percentage. Also added calculateContextWindowPercentage helper method.
Created ConversationStats component that displays token usage, cost, turns, tool calls, and context window percentage. Integrated it into the chat dock header with a collapsible toggle button.
Implementation complete. All components are in place: backend tracking via hooks, API endpoint for stats retrieval, and UI component for display. Ready for testing with live conversations.
